message:
fix: add missing aria-label attributes to role="button" elements and icon-only buttons (#4105)

Addresses accessibility issues from Auto-QA scans (#3857, #3949, #3951, #3958):
- Add aria-label to all role="button" elements missing them (insight cards,
  multi-tenancy status cards, ComplianceDrift, Sidebar)
- Add aria-label and aria-hidden to icon-only buttons in ClusterGrid
  (copy, start, stop, restart, refresh, rename)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
